BL-PROBE-approval-render — OPERATOR PROBE: confirm Approvals asks now carry full ticket detail (safe to ignore/reject)
What it solves: This is a throwaway operator probe, not a real ticket - DO NOT action, promote, or spec it.
If you see this ask on Telegram WITH a title line, a 'What it solves' line, a 'First acceptance
signal' line and an 'Approval context' line above the reply grammar, then Ask #1 is confirmed:
new approval ask…
First acceptance signal: The posted Telegram approval ask shows this title, the what-it-solves line, the acceptance signal and the approval-context line above the 'reply here' grammar
Approval context: Operator probe to prove the enriched approval-ask render (BL-480) is live on the current front-desk build. No real decision is needed - this ticket will be deleted after you confirm the details show. Safe to reject or simply ignore.
BL-PROBE-approval-render needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-PROBE-approval-render" (or "reject BL-PROBE-approval-render <reason>") to act.
